com.mentor.chs.api.servicedoc

Interface IXPackagerContext


  • @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXPackagerContext

    An interface that represents the packager context when publishing the data in Capital Publisher. This contains all the information regarding the selected designs, providers and resource locations

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.Set<? extends IXObject> getDesignObjects(IXDesign design)
      Get all the design objects.
      void getDiagramGraphics(java.io.OutputStream outputStream, IXGraphicConversions.XBaseContext graphicContext, IXDiagram diagram)
      Gets the representation of the specified diagram into the specified output stream in a format specified by the context.
      java.util.Set<? extends IXGenerator> getGenerators()
      Get the set of providers that are selected in the Packager UI
      java.lang.String getPackageName()
      Get the name of the packager that is specified in the Packager UI
      java.io.File getPackageRoot()
      Get the output location of the directory.
      IXProject getProject()
      Get the selected Project that user has chosen in the Packager UI
      IXReportContext getReportContext(java.util.List<IXDesign> designList)
      Get the IXReportContext object for a list of design.
      java.io.File getResourceLocation()
      Get the directory where resources are located.
      java.util.Set<? extends IXDesign> getScopedDesigns()
      Get selected Designs that are from Packager UI.

    • Method Detail

      • getScopedDesigns

        java.util.Set<? extends IXDesign> getScopedDesigns()
        Get selected Designs that are from Packager UI. This method applies the selected style on the daigrams of the design.
        Returns:
        set of selected designs

      • getProject

        IXProject getProject()
        Get the selected Project that user has chosen in the Packager UI
        Returns:
        IXProject the project selected

      • getGenerators

        java.util.Set<? extends IXGenerator> getGenerators()
        Get the set of providers that are selected in the Packager UI
        Returns:
        Set of selected providers

      • getResourceLocation

        java.io.File getResourceLocation()
        Get the directory where resources are located. This is the one that is specified in the Packager UI.
        Returns:
        File Directory location where resources are located

      • getPackageName

        java.lang.String getPackageName()
        Get the name of the packager that is specified in the Packager UI
        Returns:
        The package name specified in the UI

      • getPackageRoot

        java.io.File getPackageRoot()
        Get the output location of the directory.
        Returns:
        Directory root of the project location

      • getDesignObjects

        java.util.Set<? extends IXObject> getDesignObjects(IXDesign design)
        Get all the design objects. If there is a configuration selected, this method applies the configuration and returns only active objects for that configuration
        Parameters:
        design - IXDesign the design for which objects are needed.
        Returns:
        Set of IXObject with the design

      • getReportContext

        IXReportContext getReportContext(java.util.List<IXDesign> designList)
        Get the IXReportContext object for a list of design. This method constructs a report Context and that can be used for any IXReport geneations.
        Parameters:
        designList - list of IXDesign Objects
        Returns:
        IXReportContext

      • getDiagramGraphics

        void getDiagramGraphics(java.io.OutputStream outputStream,
                        IXGraphicConversions.XBaseContext graphicContext,
                        IXDiagram diagram)
        Gets the representation of the specified diagram into the specified output stream in a format specified by the context. The diagram is filtered, styled and otherwise prepared as per the generation settings.
        Parameters:
        outputStream - the output stream to which the generated representation is written
        graphicContext - the graphic context specifying the format in which the representation is generated
        diagram - the diagram belonging to one of the designs returned by getScopedDesigns(). No representation is generated if the diagram doesn't belong to the scoped designs.
